summary.intent: Fix the xterm terminal window in the individual session page so it stays anchored to the bottom and doesn't rescroll to a previous position when new content arrives.
summary.outcome: Fixed auto-scroll behavior by calling scrollToBottom() in the xterm write() callback (ensuring it fires after async rendering) and after fitAddon.fit() calls to prevent viewport shifting.

repo: The embedded terminal component is at app/src/renderer/src/components/EmbeddedTerminal.tsx
The session page using the terminal is SpawnSessionScreen.tsx

code.finding: xterm's write() is asynchronous internally; use the callback parameter to call scrollToBottom() after data is actually rendered, not immediately after write() returns
fitAddon.fit() resizes the terminal canvas and can shift the viewport, requiring an explicit scrollToBottom() call afterward to maintain bottom-anchoring

workflow: xterm.js auto-scroll must be explicitly managed — it does not automatically anchor to the bottom when new data arrives
